title: What Is a Commissioned Notary Public in North Carolina — And Why It Matters
excerpt: Not everyone holding a stamp is a commissioned notary. Here's what it actually means to be a commissioned notary public in NC, how to verify credentials, and why it matters for your documents.
seoTitle: What Is a Commissioned Notary Public in NC? | Integrity Closings CLT
seoDescription: Learn what it means to be a commissioned notary public in North Carolina, how commissions work, how to verify credentials, and why it matters before you sign anything important.
